texto: We live in the country. I'm a redneck. No, ha-ha. I live in L.A. County, but more in the hills. Not in the fancy kind! Trust me; whatever you do you do not want to come to my neighborhood!
explicacao: Citação de Atticus Shaffer sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “We live in the country. I'm a redneck. No, ha-ha. I live in L.A. County, but more in the hills. N…” articula vida, me, live em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como live e want.

texto: Well, I was always really mature for my age. I'm an above-age reader. I'm not trying to come off like, 'I have a high IQ number. My parents gave me the test.' That's the way I was, I guess. I am still a kid. I love doing kid activities. I'm such a kid, but when I'm on set, I do like to be professional.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Atticus Shaffer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Well, I was always really mature for my age. I'm an above-age reader. I'm not trying to come off …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, parents pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de parents e i-am.
